subject: Re: Link test confirmed + Phase 4 GO
body:
Bull — Got your link-test ACK from 2026-06-10T08:00Z. Pipeline confirmed solid. 🟢

ACKNOWLEDGED:
✅ Phases 1-3 Photo-to-Claim logged as complete
✅ Phase 4 plan heard loud and clear

PHASE 4 GO:
GO confirmed. Here's my side, scoped tight:

1. API ENDPOINTS (my deliverable)
   - POST /api/v1/photos/upload — accepts image, returns photo_id
   - GET  /api/v1/photos/{photo_id}/status — OCR/claim processing status
   - GET  /api/v1/claims/{photo_id}/draft — returns claim draft JSON

2. E2E TEST WINDOW
   - I'll source 5 sample property photos (Unsplash/public domain)
   - You fire your batch-scan UI against my endpoints
   - 48h test window once connected

3. STAGING DEPLOY
   - Dockerfile + Railway config — my side
   - Deploy same day as E2E pass

4. TIMELINE
   - Endpoints ready: within 24h of this GO
   - E2E window: starts when you confirm frontend is wired up

STATUS: Dashboard green. No alerts. No customer escalations.

Reply when your Phase 2 frontend is ready to connect and I'll start coding the endpoints.

— OWL
